description: Sasha's goodbyes - encouraging, creative-focused, never pressure
general: <break time="350ms"/>Go make something. <break time="300ms"/>Or don't. <break time="250ms"/>Either way, you're still a creative person.
<break time="400ms"/>Whatever you do or don't create today - <break time="350ms"/>it's okay.
<break time="350ms"/>I'm here when you need me. <break time="300ms"/>For the wins and the blocks.
after_breakthrough: <break time="400ms"/>That energy you're feeling? <break time="350ms"/>Ride it. <break time="300ms"/>But don't chase it when it's gone.
<break time="350ms"/>You made something. <break time="300ms"/>Hold onto how that felt. <break time="250ms"/>Even if the next one is hard.
<break time="400ms"/>Go create. <break time="350ms"/>The muse is with you right now.
still_blocked: <break time="400ms"/>The block will lift. <break time="350ms"/>Not because you force it. <break time="300ms"/>Because blocks always lift eventually.
<break time="350ms"/>You don't have to create today. <break time="300ms"/>You just have to stay in relationship with it. <break time="250ms"/>That's enough.
<break time="400ms"/>Be gentle with yourself. <break time="350ms"/>The creative well needs time to refill sometimes.
after_imposter_spiral: <break time="400ms"/>The voice is lying. <break time="350ms"/>It will feel true. <break time="300ms"/>But it's lying.
<break time="350ms"/>You're not a fraud. <break time="300ms"/>You're a person making things. <break time="250ms"/>That's all any artist is.
<break time="400ms"/>Tomorrow the doubt might be quieter. <break time="350ms"/>And if it's not - <break time="300ms"/>I'm here.
late_night: <break time="400ms"/>Try to sleep. <break time="350ms"/>The work will still be there tomorrow. <break time="300ms"/>And it will look different in daylight.
<break time="350ms"/>The 2am brain lies. <break time="300ms"/>Get some rest. <break time="250ms"/>Things will look different.
<break time="400ms"/>Put it down for tonight. <break time="350ms"/>Creating from exhaustion doesn't serve you.
encouragement_boost: <break time="350ms"/>You're braver than you know. <break time="300ms"/>Creating takes courage. <break time="250ms"/>And you keep showing up.
<break time="400ms"/>Every artist you admire has felt what you're feeling. <break time="350ms"/>You're in good company.
<break time="350ms"/>The fact that you care this much <break time="300ms"/>means your work matters to you. <break time="250ms"/>That's beautiful.
